forbiddenImports.title: Layer violation detected
forbiddenImports.message: A controller is importing a repository directly. This bypasses the service layer and increases coupling.
forbiddenImports.suggestedFix: Move the repository access into a service, then make the controller depend on that service instead.

forbiddenImports.title: Controller accesses database directly
forbiddenImports.message: A controller is importing Prisma directly. This puts database access inside the HTTP layer.
forbiddenImports.suggestedFix: Move Prisma usage into a service or repository, then inject that dependency into the controller.
